##NAMES=Allanite-(Ce)
##RRUFFID=R060418
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=CaCe(Al_2_Fe^2+^)[Si_2_O_7_][SiO_4_]O(OH)
##LOCALITY=Aquarius Range, Mohave County, Arizona, USA
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=John Weber
##DESCRIPTION=Dark brown partially metamict, note that a fragment of this sample was heated and is posted at R080044
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral has been confirmed by X-ray diffraction and chemical analysis
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R060418
##MEASURED CHEMISTRY=Ca_1.00_(Ce^3+^_0.36_Nd_0.18_La_0.13_Y_0.09_Th_0.07_Mn_0.06_Ca_0.06_Ti_0.05_)Fe^2+^_1.00_(Al_1.88_Fe^3+^_0.12_)[Si_2.00_O_7_][Si_1.00_O_4_]O(OH)
##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Powder, cell parameters are from single crystal
##CELL PARAMETERS=a: 9.01 b: 5.78 c: 10.36 alpha: 90 beta: 115.48 gamma: 90 volume: 488 crystal system: monoclinic
##FILETYPE=Raman Processed
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=780
